title: AI-Course Generator
description: An AI-Powered Course Generator that creates complete online courses — chapters, descriptions, and YouTube video links — from just a topic input using Google Gemini AI. Automates the manual course creation process, cutting down weeks of effort into minutes.

title: AI Diet Planner
description: Cross-platform mobile app for meal planning with AI-powered food recommendations and real-time nutritional tracking (calories, protein, carbs, fats). Provides instant AI food suggestions categorized by meal type with interactive nutritional charts.

title: Hospital Resource Optimization
description: PEC Techathon 3.0 Winner — An AI-powered real-time dashboard that predicts hospital resource needs (beds, oxygen, staff) using data analytics and live disease trends. Combines real-time data with hospital metrics for predictive insights and smart alerts.

title: Offline PKI Encryption System
description: SIH 2024 Runner-up — A hardware-based PKI solution that performs secure, offline encryption within the device using a hardware root of trust for UIDAI authentication. Platform-agnostic offline PKI encryption leveraging device hardware.

title: Silver Pearl Web App
description: Full-stack web application built during internship at Silver Pearl Innovation. Streamlined internal operations, automated manual processes, and enhanced data accessibility with improved system performance.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Personal developer portfolio built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Features dynamic animations, responsive design, dark mode, and contact form integration.
